projectDescription: A minimal, production-ready HTTP API starter built on Bun.serve with zero framework overhead, providing structured routing, rate limiting, request correlation, security headers, and consistent JSON responses.
keyFeatures: Zero framework overhead using Bun.serve and standard Request/Response
File-based modular routing under src/routes/<name>/ mounted at /api/v1/<name>
Per-route in-memory rate limiting via rate-limiter-flexible
Per-route configurable body-size limits with Content-Length enforcement
Baseline security headers on every response (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
Request correlation via X-Request-ID/X-Correlation-ID with AsyncLocalStorage
In-memory metrics (requests, duration, errors, rate limit hits, active requests)
Trusted-proxy-aware client IP resolution for logs and rate limiter keys
Consistent JSON API responses via apiSuccess/apiFailure helpers
Colorized structured logging with configurable levels via LOG_LEVEL env
CORS middleware with configurable origin allowlist and preflight handling
Gzip/brotli compression for JSON responses larger than 1 KiB
Zod-based input validation helpers for body, query, and route params
Health endpoint at /api/v1/health for Kubernetes/load balancer probes
publicApiSurface: apiSuccess(data?, init?) — Build a standard JSON success envelope
apiFailure(data?, init?) — Build a standard JSON failure envelope
createRouteLimiter({ points, durationSeconds, keyPrefix? }) — Create a per-route rate limiter
createRouteLimiter(...).consumeOr429(req, server) — Enforce rate limit, return 429 or null
createRouteBodyLimit({ maxBytes }) — Create a per-route body size enforcer
createRouteBodyLimit(...).checkBodySize(req) — Check body size, return 413 or null
defaultMaxBodyBytes() — Read MAX_BODY_BYTES env var with 1 MiB default
mergeSecurityHeaders(response) — Apply baseline security headers to a response
createCorsMiddleware() — Create CORS middleware instance
runWithRequestContext(req, fn) — Wrap handler in AsyncLocalStorage for request-scoped IDs
getRequestId() — Get current request's correlation ID
mirrorRequestIdHeader(response) — Mirror X-Request-ID onto response
runWithTrace(fn) — Wrap handler to generate distributed trace/span IDs
getTraceId() — Get current trace ID
getTraceHeaders() — Get X-Trace-ID header map
log(level, message, ctx?) — Colorized structured logger (debug/info/warn/error/success)
validateBody(schema, body) — Validate parsed body against Zod schema
validateQuery(schema, query) — Validate URL query params against Zod schema
validateParams(schema, params) — Validate route params against Zod schema
schemas.pagination, schemas.id, schemas.email — Pre-built Zod schemas
getClientIp(req, server) — Resolve client IP with trusted proxy support
getClientIpKey(req, server) — Get rate-limiter-safe IP key string
negotiateEncoding(acceptEncoding) — Parse Accept-Encoding header
compressResponse(body, encoding) — Compress response body if over 1 KiB
getMetricsSnapshot() — Get snapshot of all in-memory metrics
handleRequest(req, server) — Central request pipeline entry point
GET /api/v1/home — Example home route
GET /api/v1/health — Health check endpoint for probes
